mapper.update: UPDATE alumni_message SET reply_content = #{replyContent}, reply_time = NOW(), status = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.user_id, m.receive_user_id, m.nickname, u.nick_name as receive_nickname, m.content, m.contact, m.reply_content, m.reply_time, m.status, m.create_time, m.is_deleted FROM alumni_message m LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON m.receive_user_id = u.user_id WHERE m.is_deleted = 0 AND m.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT m.id, m.user_id, m.receive_user_id, m.nickname, u.nick_name as receive_nickname, m.content, m.contact, m.reply_content, m.reply_time, m.status, m.create_time, m.is_deleted FROM alumni_message m LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON m.receive_user_id = u.user_id WHERE id=#{id} AND is_deleted=0

SELECT m.id, m.user_id, m.receive_user_id, m.nickname, u.nick_name as receive_nickname, m.content, m.contact, m.reply_content, m.reply_time, m.status, m.create_time, m.is_deleted FROM alumni_message m LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON m.receive_user_id = u.user_id WHERE send_user_id=#{userId} AND is_deleted=0

SELECT m.id, m.user_id, m.receive_user_id, m.nickname, u.nick_name as receive_nickname, m.content, m.contact, m.reply_content, m.reply_time, m.status, m.create_time, m.is_deleted FROM alumni_message m LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON m.receive_user_id = u.user_id WHERE receive_user_id= #{receiveUserId} AND is_deleted=0
